MODULE: cosmos.cli.quick_actions
FILE: cosmos/cli/quick_actions.py (279 lines)
CATEGORY: cli

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Quick Actions

One-liner commands for common tasks, perfect for power users.

CLASSES:
- QuickActions: Quick action shortcuts for common cosmos operations.

Provides simple, single-co
  Methods: async def remember(self, content: str, tags: Optional[List[str]]=None) -> str
  Methods: async def recall(self, query: str, top_k: int=3) -> List[str]
  Methods: async def forget(self, memory_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def steps_today(self) -> Optional[int]
  Methods: async def sleep_last_night(self) -> Optional[float]
  Methods: async def log_food(self, food_name: str, calories: int, meal_type: str='snack') -> bool
  Methods: async def health_summary(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def ask(self, question: str, expert: str='general') -> str
